notes: Live 2026-04 Storefront evidence creates disposable catalog merchandise, discounts, a gift card, a customer, and a real cart; exercises cart core plus buyer identity, discount, gift-card, metafield, recalculation, warning, and error branches; and cleans up every Admin resource. Cart secrets, discount and gift-card codes, gift-card suffixes, passwords, and customer tokens are consistently redacted. Proxy replay stages every scoped write locally from shared product, inventory, publication, money, discount, gift-card, customer, market-context, and metafield semantics. Checkout, payment capture, and order creation remain intentionally unsupported.
